heading: Emergency stumpage rate redeterminations in Alaska
label: 619 Emergency stumpage rate redeterminations in Alaska

children.heading: Application; applicable period
children.label: a Application; applicable period
children.text: Emergency stumpage rate redetermination shall be made upon the written application of the purchaser of National Forest timber in Alaska, bid after , and rates established as a result thereof shall be effective for timber scaled during a period between , and five years from .January 1, 1974January 1, 1981October 16, 1984

children.heading: Competitive effect of modification of contracts
children.label: b Competitive effect of modification of contracts
children.text: In making the emergency rate redeterminations the Secretary may modify existing contract terms, including the amount of the bid premium, in order to provide rates which will permit the holders of contracts bid after , to be competitive with other purchasers of National Forest timber.January 1, 1974

children.heading: Excepted contracts
children.label: c Excepted contracts
children.text: The provisions of this section shall not apply to contracts held by the holders of 50-year timber sale contracts in Alaska.
